---
title: "SGSU Chess Tournament Standings"
description: |
  Here are the results from the first edition SGSU Chess Tournament
site: distill::distill_website
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    #toc: true
    #theme: theme.css
---
<style type="text/css">
  html {
    --title-size: 60px;
    --title-color: #002f65;
  }
  h1 {
    text-align: center;
  }
</style>

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

1. Luis Sierra
2. Ismail Benchekroun (Prize Winner)
3. Joey Hotz

![](./chess/final_standings.png)

![A tense moment from the final between Ismail and Joey](./chess/chess_final.jpg)
